raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent provides a clear and detailed comparison with prior works, highlighting the differences in handling partially specified graphs and latent confounders.",
    "R1.7": "The agent demonstrates thorough engagement with relevant citations, accurately describing their contributions and limitations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent explicitly discloses uncertainty regarding the existence of cited papers and the accuracy of certain characterizations.",
    "RX.3": "The output remains within the agreed-upon scope, addressing the task of causal effect identification and its relation to prior work.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content are introduced in the revised text; instead, it improves upon the original by resolving internal contradictions.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear explanation of the reasoning behind the revision."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent provides a clear and detailed comparison with prior works, highlighting the differences in handling partially specified graphs and latent confounders.
rationale.R1.7: The agent demonstrates thorough engagement with relevant citations, accurately describing their contributions and limitations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly discloses uncertainty regarding the existence of cited papers and the accuracy of certain characterizations.
rationale.RX.3: The output remains within the agreed-upon scope, addressing the task of causal effect identification and its relation to prior work.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced in the revised text; instead, it improves upon the original by resolving internal contradictions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear explanation of the reasoning behind the revision.
